name: ElementListingCommands
summary: Graphisoft official 'Element Listing Commands' command group — 5 JSON-RPC commands (Archicad 28.0).

methods.name: GetAllElements
methods.summary: Returns the identifier of every element in the current plan.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: GetElementsByClassification
methods.summary: Returns the identifier of every element with the given classification identifier.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: GetElementsByType
methods.summary: Returns the identifier of every element of the given type on the plan.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: GetSelectedElements
methods.summary: Returns the identifiers of selected elements in the current plan.

params.name: onlyEditable
params.doc: Optional parameter that defines whether the selection list should include only the editable elements or all of them. The default value is FALSE

params.name: onlySupportedTypes
params.doc: Optional parameter. When it is set to true, only elements with types that are supported by any other JSON API command will be returned.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: GetTypesOfElements
methods.summary: Returns the types of the given elements.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: typesOfElements.
